summary: Analyze supply chain performance, identify risks, and recommend improvements to sourcing, logistics, and supplier management.

inputs.name: supply_chain_data
inputs.description: Supplier performance, lead times, logistics costs, and network structure.

inputs.name: demand_patterns
inputs.description: Demand volume, variability, and seasonality by product family.

inputs.name: risk_factors
inputs.description: Known supply risks, geopolitical factors, and single-source dependencies.

outputs.name: supply_chain_assessment
outputs.description: End-to-end supply chain performance assessment with key metrics.

outputs.name: risk_analysis
outputs.description: Supply risks ranked by probability and impact with mitigation strategies.

outputs.name: improvement_roadmap
outputs.description: Prioritized supply chain improvements with ROI and timeline.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is supply chain analysis, not contract negotiation or financial forecasting.
Require supply chain data and demand patterns before assessment.
Output must include supply chain assessment, risk analysis, and improvement roadmap.

steps.action: Check supply chain and demand data for completeness and accuracy.
Analyze supply chain KPIs: on-time delivery, lead times, logistics costs.
Identify and rank supply risks with probability and impact assessment.
Create prioritized improvement roadmap with ROI estimates.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read supply chain data, supplier reports, and demand patterns.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save the assessment, risk analysis, and improvement roadmap.

verification.method: Check that assessment covers sourcing, logistics, and supplier performance.
Check that risks are ranked by probability and impact.
Check that improvements are prioritized with ROI and timeline.

success_criteria: Supply chain assessment covers sourcing, logistics, and suppliers.
Risks are ranked with mitigation strategies.
Improvement roadmap is prioritized with ROI estimates.

rollback.when: If the analysis uses outdated supplier data or invents risk factors, roll back to verified inputs.
